description_long: This is a compact, sporty coupe car with a distinctive Abarth livery, featuring a white body accented by red racing stripes and branding. The car has a pronounced rear spoiler, racing decals, and aerodynamic enhancements, suggesting a performance-oriented design. The wheels are white with red accents, and the tires are low-profile, further emphasizing its racing character. The front fascia includes a prominent Abarth badge, hood vents, and a lower splitter, while the rear features dual exhausts and a visible tow hook. The side profile reveals two doors, racing stripes, and a compact, rounded silhouette typical of the Fiat 500 Abarth. The windows are tinted, and the roof is adorned with a large red cross and Abarth branding, making the car visually striking and easily recognizable.
description: A compact, sporty white coupe car with red Abarth racing stripes, a rear spoiler, and performance features. It has two doors, racing decals, and a distinctive, rounded silhouette.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the dual exhausts, rear spoiler, Abarth branding on the roof, and a visible tow hook.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door configuration, racing stripes, white wheels, and the prominent rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the Abarth badge, hood vents, front splitter, and windshield branding.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the racing stripes, two doors, and rear spoiler, with a clear view of the window netting.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
